title: Launch HN: Superset (YC P26) – IDE for the agents era
description: Hey HN, we’re Avi, Kiet, and Satya. We’re building Superset ( https://github.com/superset-sh/superset ), an open-source agentic IDE for running coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode etc in parallel. Demo: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YWDHn7gUwfg Try it: https://superset.sh/ We’re three engineers who’ve built and maintained large codebases, and we kept wanting to work on more than one thing at a time.
